urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Introductory Note:
english translation text: Bibi Zainab A.S. addressing the womenfolk of Shaam (Damascus) when her caravan was leaving Damascus and heading towards Karbala.

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Shaam Ki Aurton Eik Waada Karo, Roz Qabre Sakina Pe Aaogi Tum
english translation text: O’ ladies of Shaam, make me a promise that you will you visit the grave of Sakina

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Jab Talak Laut Kar Mai Na Aaun, Aake Shamma Jalaaogi Tum
english translation text: Until I return myself (to Sakina’s grave), please light the lamp at her grave

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Shaam Ki Aurton Eik Waada Karo, Roz Qabre Sakina Pe Aaogi Tum
english translation text: O’ ladies of Shaam, make me a promise that you will you visit the grave of Sakina

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Eik Yasrab Ki Thi Shaahzaadi, Uska Saqqa Tha Abbas Ghaazi
english translation text: There once was a Princess of Medina; Her thirst was quenched by Abbas The Warrior

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Mashq Laikar Gaya Su-e-Dariyaa, Aur Qabze Mai Karli Taraayi
english translation text: He went forth with a water pouch towards the riverbank, and gained control (could not be stopped by the enemy) over the stream

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Loriyon Mai Yeh Sachi Kahaani, Roz Isko Sunaaogi Tum
english translation text: Make sure you always narrate this story in lullabies to your children

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Shaam Ki Auraton Ek Waada Karo
english translation text: Make a promise, O ladies of Syria

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Hamne Zindaan Se Paayi Rihaai, Ab Behen Paas Hogi Na Bhai
english translation text: We have been released from the dungeons of Shaam; a sister (Bibi Zainab) is left alone without a brother (Imam Hussain A.S.)

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Baat Itni Si Bas Yaad Rakhna, Meri Bacchi Hai Gham Ki Sataayi
english translation text: Just remember this: my child has been tormented by sorrows

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Tumne Bazaar Main Toh Sataaya, Ab Na Isko Sataaogi Tum
english translation text: You (ladies of Shaam) tormented her in the Bazar; now, please don’t torment her anymore

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Shaam Ki Auraton Ek Waada Karo
english translation text: Make a promise, O ladies of Syria

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Jab Kabhi Qaid Khane Main Aana, Beridaa Bibiyon Ko Na Laana
english translation text: Whenever you come to the prison, do not bring the ladies unveiled

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Tumko Asghar Bhi Dega Duaaen, Iski Tanhaiyaan Yun Mitaana
english translation text: Asghar will pray for you; and in this way you will help erase Sakina’s loneliness

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Chhote Chhote Se Baccho Ko Laakar, Paas Iske Sulaaogi Tum
english translation text: Please bring your small children with you and let them sleep near Sakina’s grave

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Shaam Ki Auraton Ek Waada Karo
english translation text: Make a promise, O ladies of Syria

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Qabre Bekas Pe Aansun Bahaane, Haal Qaide Sitam Ka Sunaane
english translation text: As we weep on the grave of the helpless (Imam Hussain); and narrate the story of our cruel imprisonment

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Qaafla Karbala Ko Chalaa Hai, Iske Baba Ka Chehlum Manaane
english translation text: Our caravan heads to Karbala, to observe Sakina’s father’s Fortieth

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Itna Kehdo Hamaari Taraf Se, Iska Chehlum Manaaogi Tum
english translation text: Tell her, on our behalf, that you too will observe her Fortieth by her grave

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Shaam Ki Auraton Ek Waada Karo
english translation text: Make a promise, O ladies of Syria

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Shaamiyon Ki Bahu Betiyon Se, Keh Rahi Thi Woh Zainab Yeh Roke
english translation text: To the daughters of the Shaam, Zainab wept and said:

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Yeh Amaanat hai Pardesiyon Ki, Kar Rahi Hun Tumhaare Hawaale
english translation text: I am entrusting to you this treasure (Sakina’s grave) from those of a foreign land;

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Mujhse Ik Baar Bas Itna Kehdo, Apna Waada Nibhaaogi Tum
english translation text: Just once more, say only this much to me: that you will fulfil your promise (of visiting her grave)

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Shaam Ki Auraton Ek Waada Karo
english translation text: Make a promise, O ladies of Syria

urdu transliteration text:
Shaam ki aurton (O Ladies of Syria)
Shaam Ki Auraton Ek Waada Karo
english translation text: Make a promise, O ladies of Syria
